mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_points WHERE parent_id=#{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM knowledge_points ORDER BY parent_id, sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_points (name, parent_id, grade_level, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{gradeLevel}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_points SET name=#{name}, grade_level=#{gradeLevel}, description=#{description}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT kp_id FROM question_kp WHERE question_id=#{questionId}
SELECT question_id, kp_id FROM question_kp WHERE question_id IN #{id}
